title: Odd One Out Orchard
short_description: One thing in every basket does NOT belong — spot the impostor before Granny Smith notices!
description: Something strange is growing in Granny Smith's orchard! In every basket, one thing simply does not belong — a shark among the pets, a donut among the socks, a pizza in the orchestra. Spot the impostor and boot it out before Granny notices, and learn WHY it doesn't fit: is it the only vegetable, the only verb, the only number that isn't prime? Younger players spot easy visual impostors; older players face sneaky ones (careful — the bat is a mammal, and thunder never actually falls from the sky). A free online odd-one-out classification and reasoning game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the one item that does not belong before the timer runs out.
